_comment: AI Workshop 2.0 — companion to SSL 26 Edition README.md. Course-level overview, <65s, 4 scenes. Phonetic patches: 'read me file' (=README), 'Clawd-dot-M-D' (=CLAUDE.md only), 'M-C-Ps' (=MCPs), 'Module zero-zero-zero' (=Module-000). 'Claude' / 'Claude Code' restored — only the .md file form needs the Clawd correction. Em-dash flow over hard stops to keep cadence natural.

scenes.text: This is a self-drive course — you digest the read me file, then you give Claude the setup file, and Claude does the work. It asks you questions, you ask it back. Simple.

Every module works the same way. Start with the read me file — understand what you're building. Then right-click the setup file, copy the path, and paste that path into Claude. Answer the questions, verify the result, and move on.
Seven modules, in order. You start by installing Claude Code. Then Clawd-dot-M-D, Master Log, Slash Commands, M-C-Ps, and finally Agents. Each one builds on the last — don't skip.
Open Module zero-zero-zero, get Claude Code on your machine, and the rest unlocks one module at a time.
